input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.1.2
            TITLE: the efficiency score is based only on the distance the vehicle runs on the course during the

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.1.2: The Efficiency score is based only on the distance the vehicle runs on the course during the
D.13.1.2 The Efficiency score is based only on the distance the vehicle runs on the course during the 
Endurance event, and the total fuel/energy used.  No adjustment to distance or fuel/energy 
will be made.

final_answer: The Efficiency score is based only on the distance the vehicle runs on the course during the Endurance event, and the total fuel/energy used. No adjustment to distance or fuel/energy will be made.
